creator: jw@innerewut.de
text:
This is the update of Rails 1.1.6 to 1.2.1. It includes the updates to

devel/rubygem-activesupport 1.3.1 -> 1.4.0
mail/rubygem-actionmailer 1.2.5 -> 1.3.1
databases/rubygem-activerecord 1.14.4 -> 1.15.1
www/rubygem-actionpack 1.12.5 -> 1.13.1
www/rubygem-actionwebservice 1.1.6 -> 1.2.1
www/rubygem-rails 1.1.6 -> 1.2.1

Fix: 

Install the patches from 

http://blog.innerewut.de/files/rails-1.2.1/rails-1.2.1.patch
http://blog.innerewut.de/files/rails-1.2.1/activesupport-1.4.0.patch
http://blog.innerewut.de/files/rails-1.2.1/activerecord-1.15.1.patch
http://blog.innerewut.de/files/rails-1.2.1/actionmailer-1.3.1.patch
http://blog.innerewut.de/files/rails-1.2.1/actionpack-1.13.1.patch
http://blog.innerewut.de/files/rails-1.2.1/actionwebservice-1.2.1.patch

or install the one-for-all-patch from

http://blog.innerewut.de/files/rails-1.2.1/all.patch
How-To-Repeat: Install the patches.
